title: Orbital Strike Canons
description: Adds Stab Shot & Nuke Shot items. MAY CAUSE LAG!
body:
# Orbital Strike Canons

### This mod has 2 new items:

#### Stab Shot:
- Spawns TNTs from height limit down to bedrock
- Crafted with 1 Block of Netherite, 6 TNTs, 1 Block of Emerald, and 1 Fishing Rod

#### Nuke Shot:
- Spawns TNTs in a huge circular area
- Crafted with 1 Block of Netherite, 6 TNTs, 1 Nether Star, and 1 Fishing Rod


**These items are one-time-use and will be destroyed after usage!**

## WARNING: THIS MOD MAY CAUSE LAG ON LOW-END DEVICES!

##### p.s. Feedbacks are greatly appreciated!
